mapper.sql: id, doc_id, kb_id, parent_id, chunk_type, content, content_vector, content_hash, tsv, token_count, status, metadata, create_time, update_time
id, parent_id, content, doc_id, kb_id, metadata
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO kb_chunk (doc_id, kb_id, parent_id, chunk_type, content, content_vector, content_hash, token_count, status, metadata) VALUES (#{docId}, #{kbId}, #{parentId}, COALESCE(#{chunkType}, 'child'), #{content},
#{contentVector}::vector NULL ,
#{contentHash} NULL , COALESCE(#{tokenCount}, 0), COALESCE(#{status}, 'draft'),
#{metadata}::jsonb NULL )

INSERT INTO kb_chunk (doc_id, kb_id, parent_id, chunk_type, content, content_hash, token_count, status, metadata) VALUES
(#{c.docId}, #{c.kbId}, #{c.parentId}, COALESCE(#{c.chunkType}, 'child'), #{c.content},
#{c.contentHash} NULL , COALESCE(#{c.tokenCount}, 0), COALESCE(#{c.status}, 'draft'),
#{c.metadata}::jsonb NULL )
mapper.update: UPDATE kb_chunk SET content_vector = #{vector}::vector, status = 'active' WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE kb_chunk SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE kb_chunk SET parent_id = #{parentId} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT FROM kb_chunk WHERE doc_id = #{docId} ORDER BY CASE WHEN parent_id IS NULL THEN id ELSE parent_id END, id
SELECT FROM kb_chunk WHERE doc_id = #{docId} AND chunk_type = 'child' AND (status = 'draft' OR content_vector IS NULL) ORDER BY id
SELECT FROM kb_chunk WHERE id = #{parentId} AND chunk_type = 'parent'

SELECT c.id AS chunk_id, p.content AS parent_content, d.file_name AS doc_name FROM kb_chunk c LEFT JOIN kb_chunk p ON c.parent_id = p.id AND p.chunk_type = 'parent' LEFT JOIN kb_document d ON c.doc_id = d.id WHERE c.id IN
#{cid}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM kb_chunk WHERE doc_id = #{docId} AND chunk_type = 'child'
